flaminaguide.FinishSetupLaterDescription: Flamina kept the fast path open. These advanced items can be completed any time.
flaminaguide.permissions.characterImpact: This affects what the character can see, hear, and control locally.
flaminaguide.permissions.description: Permissions control what your character can see or do on this machine.
flaminaguide.permissions.recommended: Recommended default: grant only the permissions you need today and defer the rest.
flaminaguide.permissions.skipEffect: If you skip, the character still starts, but system-aware actions stay unavailable until you enable them.
flaminaguide.permissions.title: Permissions and system access
flaminaguide.permissions.whenToUse: Grant them now if you want the character to inspect the screen, use devices, or control local capabilities.
flaminaguide.provider.characterImpact: This affects how the character reasons, how fast it replies, and the overall output quality.
flaminaguide.provider.description: This picks the intelligence source behind your character.
flaminaguide.provider.recommended: Recommended default: use the detected or top recommended provider, then refine it later in settings.
flaminaguide.provider.skipEffect: If you skip, the app uses the recommended route so you can get started first.
flaminaguide.provider.title: Model and provider
flaminaguide.provider.whenToUse: Choose it now if you care about reasoning style, latency, or subscription path.
flaminaguide.rpc.characterImpact: This affects the character’s access to wallets, chains, and external execution.
flaminaguide.rpc.description: RPC settings decide whether your character can reach chains, wallets, and external onchain actions.
flaminaguide.rpc.recommended: Recommended default: skip for now unless onchain access is part of the first-run experience you need.
flaminaguide.rpc.skipEffect: If you skip, the character still works for chat and setup, but chain-connected actions stay limited.
flaminaguide.rpc.title: RPC and chain access
flaminaguide.rpc.whenToUse: Configure this if the character needs to inspect balances, sign actions, or work with chains directly.
flaminaguide.tasks.permissions.descripti: Grant only the local access needed for system-aware behavior.
flaminaguide.tasks.permissions.label: Permissions
flaminaguide.tasks.provider.description: Pick or refine the model/provider that powers the character.
flaminaguide.tasks.provider.label: Provider setup
flaminaguide.tasks.rpc.description: Add chain connectivity if the character needs wallet or onchain actions.
flaminaguide.tasks.rpc.label: RPC setup
flaminaguide.tasks.voice.description: Tune how the character sounds without affecting its saved identity.
flaminaguide.tasks.voice.label: Voice setup
flaminaguide.voice.characterImpact: This affects how the character sounds and feels in spoken interactions.
flaminaguide.voice.description: Voice settings shape how the character sounds, not whether the character itself is saved.
flaminaguide.voice.recommended: Recommended default: save the character first, then tune voice once the core profile feels right.
flaminaguide.voice.skipEffect: If you skip, the character identity still saves and works; only the voice layer stays deferred.
flaminaguide.voice.title: Voice and presentation
flaminaguide.voice.whenToUse: Configure this when spoken output matters for the experience or you want a specific presentation style.

onboarding.setupTokenInstructions:
Cách lấy setup token:

• Cách A: Chạy  claude setup-token  trong terminal

• Cách B: Vào claude.ai/settings/api → "Claude Code" → "Use setup token"

settings.companionAnimateWhenHidden.desc: Khi cửa sổ hoặc tab bị ẩn, giữ avatar idle nhưng ẩn thế giới 3D (Gaussian splat + Spark). Tốn ít GPU hơn cảnh đầy đủ trong khi nhân vật vẫn chuyển động.
settings.companionHalfFramerate.desc: Giới hạn đồng hành 3D khoảng một nửa tần số quét màn hình (~30 fps trên 60 Hz). Độc lập với chất lượng pixel và bóng: tiết kiệm GPU mà không hạ độ phân giải, hoặc giữ tốc độ khung hình đầy khi vẫn dùng pixel tiết kiệm pin.
settings.companionHalfFramerate.label: FPS đồng hành 3D
settings.companionVrmPower.desc: Mức GPU cho đồng hành 3D: chất lượng tối đa, theo pin trên desktop (mặc định), hoặc luôn tiết kiệm năng lượng.
settings.companionVrmPower.label: Render đồng hành 3D
